hard_stops.logic: project must be initialized before any energy or sustainability review activities begin
design has unresolved energy code violations — cannot obtain building permit or certificate of occupancy

soft_flags.logic: green building certification items are overdue — LEED, ENERGY STAR, or other certification timeline at risk
energy incentive application deadline is within 30 days — action required to preserve financial benefit
solar feasibility has not been evaluated — may be required by local code or beneficial for project economics
EV charging infrastructure is below tenant's requirements — local code or lender requirements may apply
